title: Local job matching platform frontend (profiles, jobs, applications, area-based matching)

requirements.summary: Add Internet Identity sign-in/out UI and use authenticated Principal context for all user-owned views and mutations.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can sign in/out with Internet Identity in the UI.
Backend endpoints that create/update data associate records with caller Principal.
Users cannot edit or delete other users’ profiles or job postings.

file_operations.description: Fix global stylesheet import to correctly load the Tailwind base styles from frontend/index.css and ensure auth + React Query providers wrap the app for authenticated flows.

Create a Login/Logout button using the Internet Identity flow from the selected "authorization" component; clear React Query cache on logout. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add an auth guard wrapper that blocks application data screens unless the user is signed in (treat anonymous as guest), showing a friendly sign-in call-to-action. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add a thin hook that composes useActor() and returns a ready actor plus a stable "isAuthenticated" flag (based on Internet Identity) for screens to gate queries/mutations. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Implement React Query hooks to fetch the caller role and caller profile (getCallerUserRole/getCallerProfile) and expose loading/error states for top-level navigation decisions. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement worker/provider profile create/view/edit flows, including a free-text area field used for matching, plus public read-only profile viewing.
acceptanceCriteria: A signed-in user can create a profile selecting role: Worker or Provider.
Profile includes at minimum: display name, role, area (free-text), optional bio/contact (non-sensitive, e.g., email/phone as plain text).
A user can view and edit their own profile.
Other users can view a public read-only version of a profile (no edit controls).

file_operations.description: Extend the typed frontend backend interface and data types to include any profile fields required by the UI (e.g., optional bio/contact) and any missing read methods needed for public profile viewing; keep types aligned with actual backend capabilities.
Create React Query hooks for profile operations: getCallerProfile, saveCallerProfile, and getProfile(public) with proper cache keys and invalidation after mutations.

Create the 'My Profile' screen with create/edit form (display name, role Worker/Provider, area, optional bio/contact) and read-only preview; use shadcn-ui components for form controls and consistent layout. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a public read-only profile view page for another user (by principal string in route), with no edit controls; show area and non-sensitive fields only.

Add a reusable profile summary card component used in applicant lists and public profile pages; compose shadcn-ui Card/Badge primitives (do not modify ui components). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement provider job listing CRUD UI and worker job browsing with filters by area and category/tags; support job status (open/closed).
acceptanceCriteria: Only Provider-role accounts can create job listings.
Providers can edit/close/delete only their own jobs.
Workers can browse open jobs and view job details.
Job list supports filtering by area and category/tags (basic UI filters).

file_operations.description: Extend typed backend interface to include missing job capabilities required by the UI (job detail fetch, provider job list, update fields/status, delete), while keeping existing types (Job, SearchParams) consistent.
Add React Query hooks for job search/list, job detail, and provider mutations (create/update/status/delete) with cache invalidation so lists and details stay in sync.

Build the main browse jobs screen with search/filter UI (area + category/tags + optional title) and a results list; compose shadcn-ui Input/Select/Button/Card for consistent styling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a job detail screen showing title/description/area/category/status and role-appropriate actions (Worker: apply; Provider owner: edit fields, close/reopen, delete, and applicant review panel).
Create a provider dashboard 'My Jobs' showing the provider’s job listings and a create/edit form; gate access based on caller role (Provider) and hide actions otherwise.

Add a reusable Job card component for list rendering with status badge and area/category chips; compose shadcn-ui Card/Badge primitives (do not modify ui components). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement worker apply flow and provider applicant review with accept/reject, preventing duplicates and highlighting ‘local’ matches based on backend area normalization rules.
acceptanceCriteria: A Worker can apply to an open job once; duplicate applications are prevented.
A Provider can view a list of applicants for each job and see each applicant’s public profile info and area.
A Provider can accept or reject an application; the application status is visible to both parties.
UI indicates when an application is considered ‘local’ based on area matching rules used by the backend.

file_operations.description: Extend typed backend interface to include provider applicant listing per job and a typed way to obtain backend-computed locality for an application (or application+job locality flag), as needed to render the ‘local’ indicator.
Implement React Query hooks for applyToJob, getMyApplications, provider job applications listing, and updateApplicationStatus (accept/reject), with cache invalidation across job detail + dashboards.

Create an apply dialog (cover letter input + submit) for Workers; disable/replace with status UI if already applied, and surface backend authorization/duplicate errors gracefully using shadcn-ui Dialog/Alert. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create the provider applicant review list component for a job, showing applicant public profile summary (name/area) and accept/reject controls; include a ‘Local’ badge driven by backend locality result. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create the worker dashboard 'My Applications' showing each application with job reference, current status (pending/accepted/rejected), and a ‘local’ indicator when provided by backend rules.

requirements.summary: Apply a consistent, warm neutral marketplace theme (non-blue/purple primary) across all screens using Tailwind/shadcn variables and shared layout styling.
acceptanceCriteria: The UI uses a consistent non-blue/purple primary palette (e.g., warm neutrals with an accent).
Core screens share consistent layout, navigation, and typography.
Shadcn/Tailwind styling is applied consistently (no unstyled default blocks).

file_operations.description: Update CSS variables (e.g., --primary/--accent/--ring and related foregrounds) to a warm neutral + accent palette (avoid blue/purple) while preserving shadcn variable structure.
Adjust theme extensions if needed to support consistent typography/spacing defaults for the marketplace UI (without introducing a blue/purple primary).

Create a shared layout wrapper (header/nav + content container) that standardizes spacing and typography; compose shadcn-ui components for nav and consistent styling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Build the main screens and navigation (browse jobs, auth entry, profile, provider job management, job detail/apply, provider applicant review, worker application status) with React Query for all data interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can navigate between: Browse Jobs, My Profile, and a role-appropriate dashboard (Provider: My Jobs; Worker: My Applications).
Job detail page includes an Apply action for Workers and applicant management for the owning Provider.
All API interactions use React Query for loading/error states and cache invalidation after mutations.

file_operations.description: Create the app composition root that wires together AuthRequired, AppLayout, and a simple router to required screens; ensure unauthenticated users see only authentication entry UI.

Implement a lightweight hash-based router (no external routing dependency) supporting required routes: Browse Jobs, Job Detail, My Profile, Provider My Jobs, Worker My Applications, and Public Profile.
Define route constants/builders (e.g., job detail by id, public profile by principal) to avoid hard-coded strings and ensure consistent navigation wiring.

Implement top navigation links to Browse Jobs, My Profile, and role-appropriate dashboard (Provider: My Jobs; Worker: My Applications), plus LoginButton; hide/disable links appropriately until role/profile is loaded.
Add a shared loading/empty/error renderer to keep screens consistent; use it across all React Query powered pages for coherent UX.
Add a simple not-found screen for unknown hash routes and wire it as the fallback in App.tsx.
